name: ai-translate-api
description: Ai Translate local backend for desktop realtime translation infrastructure.

scripts.test:unit: cross-env TMPDIR=tmp NODE_ENV=test node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --test-reporter spec --test-concurrency=1 src/**/*.unit.spec.ts
scripts.test:integration: cross-env TMPDIR=tmp RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --test-reporter spec --test-concurrency=1 src/**/*.integration.spec.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:watch: cross-env TMPDIR=tmp NODE_ENV=test node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx --test --watch src/**/*.spec.ts
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env TMPDIR=tmp RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file-if-exists=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --experimental-test-coverage --test-concurrency=1 src/**/*.spec.ts
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
